name: Verkada
info: Built in-house version of Serval. Reduced infra cost of 400 TB per month log ingestion pipeline by over 50%. Set up Kubernetes security monitoring.

name: BSides SF
info: Presented at BSides SF 2026, one of the most important security conferences, about how to use create your own security focused coding agents.

name: Parallel Computing
info: Tested a new language for implicit dataflow parallelism. Achieved a 20x reduction of run time by running parallel computations on GPUs using CUDA.
